title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind is expanding SynthID, an imperceptible watermark technology for AI-generated content, to more partners. The tool aims to help identify and authenticate content created by AI systems. The expansion signals growing industry adoption of provenance tracking for synthetic media.
